keyPoints: Key Point 1: Color Models (RGB, CMYK, Lab)
Key Point 2: Pseudocolor Image Processing (Pseudocolor Representation)
Key Point 3: Full Color Image Processing (FCC)
Key Point 4: Color Image Smoothing and Sharpening (Gaussian Blurring, Unsharp Masking)
Key Point 5: Using Color in Image Segmentation (Thresholding, Clustering)
Key Point 6: Noise in Color Images (Noise Types, Noise Reduction Techniques)
